title: Group Last Expense
definition: This is a valuable and affordable life cover developed to cater to losses suffered upon the occurrence of death. With our last funeral plan, yourself or your beneficiaries get financial aid to support funeral expenses. You can take the plan just yourself and your family. This includes your parents, spouse, and or up to four children.
benefits: We let you choose when you would like your cover to start Cover on 24-hour worldwide basis Waiting period? For accidental cases, there is no waiting period, but for the natural causes of death and illness, there is a 3-month waiting period Staff loyalty can also be built through extended value by offering cash or service to the staff member's family at the time of bereavement It's affordable, offers additional services such as bereavement counselling, and is simple to administer with the support of highly experienced insurers like Old Mutual, with over 175 years in business
eligibility: To enable the placement of the funeral cover, Old Mutual Life Assurance will require the following information and/or documents. Group profile, for example, a photocopy of the certificate of registration. Schedule of members to be covered and amounts of cover per member, including the following information details: full names of the member and relatives, and their respective dates of birth.
